data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals will discuss Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 8, 2025, 8:30 a.m. ET. Release before market open.
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Princeton, New Jersey, is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Friday, August 8, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ANIP, disclosed that the report will be made public before the market opens on the respective day.

data.title: ExxonMobil's 2Q25 earnings were $7.08B, down $631M from 1Q25. Earnings excluding identified items were $3.40 per share.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) reported earnings of $7.082 billion under U.S. GAAP, reflecting a decrease of $631 million from the first quarter of 2025. Earnings excluding identified items stood at $7.082 billion for the same period. Year-to-date in 2025, the company's earnings were $14.795 billion under U.S. GAAP, showing a decline of $2.665 billion compared to the prior year. Earnings per common share were $1.64 in the second quarter, down by $0.12 from the previous quarter. Earnings per common share excluding identified items were also $1.64 for the same period. The year-to-date earnings per common share for 2025 were $3.40, indicating a decrease of $0.80 from the previous year.

data.description: The value of ADA drops to $0.72 due to a downturn in the market, challenging crucial support levels. Despite this, technical indicators suggest an oversold market, potentially offering a buying opportunity for investors.

data.title: Huya's inaugural Delta Force Diamond Champions Summer Season Tournament proves successful; showcases Huya's entertainment services.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, as of August 1, 2025, HUYA Inc. (NYSE: HUYA), a prominent provider of game-related entertainment and services, has completed its first Delta Force Diamond Champions (DDC) Summer Season. This event showcased Huya's ongoing success in the industry.

data.title: TELUS reports Q2 2025 results: 198,000 total customer growth, mentions strong demand for bundled services, PureFibre connectivity, and TELUS health segment.
data.description: The company reported a significant increase in total Mobile and Fixed customer growth, with 198,000 new customers added. This growth was propelled by high demand for their comprehensive bundled services and the strategic expansion of TELUS PureFibre connectivity. The company also demonstrated strong performance in TTech, particularly in the TELUS health segment, surpassing goals in Operating Revenue and Adjusted EBITDA.

data.title: Brookfield Business Partners reports Q2 2025 results with financial data announced for the quarter ended June 30.
data.description: Brookfield Business Partners, a leading company listed on NYSE (BBU, BBUC) and TSX (BBU.UN, BBUC), released its financial report for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The announcement was made on August 1, 2025.

data.title: nVent Electric plc released Q2 2025 financial results, available at company’s website. Conference call will be held at 9:00 a.m.
data.description: In London, today, nVent Electric plc (NYSE:NVT), a prominent player in electrical connection and protection solutions worldwide, announced its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The earnings release for this quarter is now accessible on the company’s Investor Relations website, while also set to be submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission on a Form 8-K, and can be viewed here. In addition to this, nVent will conduct a conference call at 9:00 a.m. with analysts and investors.

data.title: Chevron's Q2 2025 earnings at $2.5 billion ($1.45 per share), down from $4.4 billion ($2.43 per share) in Q2 2024.
data.description: Houston-based Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) announced its second-quarter earnings for 2025, totaling $2.5 billion, which equates to $1.45 per share (diluted). This marks a significant decrease from the previous year's second quarter earnings of $4.4 billion, equivalent to $2.43 per share (diluted). The reported earnings for this quarter were impacted by a net loss of $215 million stemming from the fair value measurement of Hess Corporation shares, along with company pension curtailment costs. However, these were in part offset by gains from the sale of select non-operated U.S. pipeline assets. Furthermore, foreign currency effects also played a role in diminishing the overall earnings for the quarter.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC) declares a $0.08 cash dividend per share of Class A stock on August 29, 2025.
data.description: In Houston, Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC), a company specializing in production optimization, artificial lift, and methane abatement solutions for the oil and natural gas sector, has reported a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of Class A common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on August 29, 2025, to Class A common stockholders recorded as of August 15, 2025. Flowco MergeCo LLC, the operational arm of the company, will oversee the distribution.

data.title: Dorian LPG Ltd. declared $0.60/Share dividend, returns $25.6M. Q1 FY2026 financial results announced.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, Dorian LPG Ltd. (NYSE: LPG), a prominent owner and operator of modern VLGCs, declared an irregular cash dividend of $0.60 per share of common stock. This move will return around $25.6 million of capital to shareholders. Additionally, the company released its financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on or about [date].

data.title: Vista Gold to attend Diggers & Dealers Mining Forum 2025 in Kalgoorlie, Australia from August 4-6, with 2,700 attendees.
data.description: Vista Gold Corp. is set to attend the Diggers & Dealers Mining Forum from August 4-6, 2025, in Kalgoorlie, Western Australia. This forum is a premier event in Australia's mining industry, attracting more than 2,700 attendees and 150 exhibitors. It serves as a gathering for key figures in mining, including leaders, developers, explorers, brokers, bankers, investors, financiers, and mining service industries. Vista Gold Corp. will represent its interests and engage with the diverse array of stakeholders present at the event.

data.title: 12 tech announcements this week: PayPal enables crypto payments, Palo Alto acquires CyberArk, Norton introduces deepfake protection.
data.description: This week, notable tech updates from PR Newswire include PayPal's introduction of cryptocurrency payments, Palo Alto acquiring CyberArk, and Norton releasing advanced deepfake protection. The highlights from New York on August 1, 2025, feature these key developments shaping the tech industry. These include PayPal incorporating crypto payments, Palo Alto's acquisition of CyberArk, and Norton unveiling new deepfake defense measures, marking significant strides in the tech field.
